features.name: module attribute annotation with parameter reference
features.description: Code should include a module-level attribute annotation where the attribute value references a parameter variable

features.name: parametric module with annotated ports using parameter
features.description: Code should include a parametric module where a parameter is used in port array dimensions and also referenced in a module-level attribute annotation
features.snippet:
(* attri_value = d *)
module error_example
#(parameter d=2)
(input [d-1:0] a,
 input [d-1:0] b,
 output [d-1:0] c);
